visa_types.name: Family member of an EU citizen
visa_types.documents_required:
- To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
- Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Download application form in English.
- Download application form in Swedish.
- One recent photograph in color, of head on, with the uncovered head for gentleman and white background.
- Passport :
- Copy of the biometric and all used pages.
- current passport must contain at least two blank pages ( one of them shouldn’t have a visa in the other side)
- The passport should be valid for at least 3 months after return from the planned trip.
- Previous passport covering the last 7 years is mandatory
- Movement certificate is required in these cases:
- The passports not covering the last 7 years.
- If there is a gap between the current and the previous passport more than 3 months.
- Invitation letter of official invitation from the inviting company in Sweden (on official company paper, stamped and signed containing the following information :
- The full address and contacts of the company
- Name and position of the countersigning officer
- Purpose and duration of the visit
- Person or entity that will bear the travel and living costs and whether the sponsor gives financial guarantee for the visa applicants' return to Egypt.
- Certificate of the employment: specifying the date of recruitment, position in the company, salary level, purpose of the travel and confirmation of leave approved.
- Documents to be provided by company owner: original and copy of the commercial registry and tax card translated.
- Original personal bank statement for the past 6 months in the absence of bank statement, proof of the other assets has to be provided.(Each page has to be stamped)
- A round trip ticket reservation, primary reservation is mandatory.
- Hotel booking confirmation or proof of accommodation.(primary reservation)
Travel medical insurance covering the entire period of the intended stay, and valid for all Schengen states and covering any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation
                                                                        for medical reasons, urgent medical attention .emergency hospital treatment or death during the stay .the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR.
If the documents is in Arabic it should be translated into English or Swedish
If the applicant is under the age of 18, one of the Parents must at least accompany the minor during the visit at VFS Center, and the other parent must provide an original official (Notarized) consent letter in both English and Arabic. also, if one of the applicants is living abroad must provide an original official (Notarized) consent letter in both English and Arabic. please note that original birth certificate translated into English must be provided and provide copies from parent's passports.
Important Note:
Original Family registry Certificate is mandatory for any marital status from Country of Origin to be translated into English.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Tourist, Relatives/Friend, Business, Conference, Sports and Cultural are: -

[Table:    Business]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or with debit / credit card.

## VFS service charge
Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 942 EGP / 15 Euro : payable in cash or with debit / credit card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Egyptian pounds is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
-  The Visa fee & service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

[Table:    Business]
Below are the additional optional services available at the visa application center at nominal price.
All optional services are non-refundable.
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge in EGP 942 (for submission with biometrics) inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for applicants applying at the visa application Centre.(the VFS service charge is changeable based on the euro rate and can be changed without any notifications, and the difference amount can be paid or refunded on the same day of submission).

[Table:    Business]

## VISA Fee Exemption:
The following pay no fee:
- Children under six years of age.
- School pupils, students, research students and accompanying teachers on study or training trips.
- Third-country researchers travelling for the purpose of pursuing scientific research.
- Representatives of non-governmental organisations who are aged 25 or under, who take part in seminars, conferences, sports events, cultural events or educational events organised
                                                                            by NGOs.
- Relatives of citizens of the EU, Norway, Iceland, Liechtenstein or Switzerland, if they travel together with them or will be meeting them in connection with the trip. Read more about which individuals are counted as relatives on the Swedish Migration Board website. Relatives of Swedish citizens have to pay the fee for visa applications.

## Documents Required

- To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
- Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Download application form in English.
- Download application form in Swedish.
- One recent photograph in color, of head on, with the uncovered head for gentleman and white background.
- Passport :
- Copy of the biometric and all used pages.
- current passport must contain at least two blank pages ( one of them shouldn’t have a visa in the other side)
- The passport should be valid for at least 3 months after return from the planned trip.
- Previous passport covering the last 7 years is mandatory
- Movement certificate is required in these cases:
- The passports not covering the last 7 years.
- If there is a gap between the current and the previous passport more than 3 months.
- Invitation letter of official invitation from the inviting company in Sweden (on official company paper, stamped and signed containing the following information :
- The full address and contacts of the company
- Name and position of the countersigning officer
- Purpose and duration of the visit
- Person or entity that will bear the travel and living costs and whether the sponsor gives financial guarantee for the visa applicants' return to Egypt.
- Certificate of the employment: specifying the date of recruitment, position in the company, salary level, purpose of the travel and confirmation of leave approved.
- Documents to be provided by company owner: original and copy of the commercial registry and tax card translated.
- Original personal bank statement for the past 6 months in the absence of bank statement, proof of the other assets has to be provided.(Each page has to be stamped)
- A round trip ticket reservation, primary reservation is mandatory.
- Hotel booking confirmation or proof of accommodation.(primary reservation)
Travel medical insurance covering the entire period of the intended stay, and valid for all Schengen states and covering any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation
                                                                        for medical reasons, urgent medical attention .emergency hospital treatment or death during the stay .the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR.
If the documents is in Arabic it should be translated into English or Swedish
If the applicant is under the age of 18, one of the Parents must at least accompany the minor during the visit at VFS Center, and the other parent must provide an original official (Notarized) consent letter in both English and Arabic. also, if one of the applicants is living abroad must provide an original official (Notarized) consent letter in both English and Arabic. please note that original birth certificate translated into English must be provided and provide copies from parent's passports.
Important Note:
Original Family registry Certificate is mandatory for any marital status from Country of Origin to be translated into English.
Please gather the relevant documents provided in the document checklist click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/36EROPTSHdnAYkjfYOjzc9/684f802d7950ce6b6fc0ecf6f4b65241/Check_list_Business-updated.pdf): 

## Photo Specifications
Note: We regret we cannot accept photographs that do not meet these requirements
 Please provide one recent photographs (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- It should be without glasses.
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background].
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note : Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. For detailed information, please here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/YV6igMjBHi7Xgeojqz3my/65f2dcae173a274288b25d0dcf372264/Photograph_requirements.pdf). 

## Processing Time
Visa processing time is usually 14 working days for both locations Cairo and Alexandria.

## Download Forms
All forms must be filled in before your appointment date.
Please click here to download (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7l3Z43SaEWMBZ7h5sWZVan/6a1d9591f6615071d7c0ff7c3b1bc571/application-for-schengen-visa.pdf) form in English.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
For tourists, Sweden is a country rich in opportunities; from the Arctic beauty of the North with its midnight sun, to the castles of the southernmost province Skåne with its more continental
                                                                        flavor. Visitors to Northern Sweden can experience the frozen thrills of the Ice Hotel in Jukkasjärvi, dog sledging, ice fishing, snowmobiling and more. Further South, visitors can
                                                                        enjoy the 1,680 miles of coastline with tens of thousands of islands to explore, or a trip back in time on a cruise on the Göta Canal aboard a vintage steamboat.
Stockholm, the beautiful capital of Sweden, has been labeled "Beauty on water", but it is also a city for fashion, design and trends. The American magazine Newsweek recently
                                                                        lableled Stockholm
Europe's Internet capital"; a city characterized by "hot IPO's and cool clubs!
Sweden is also a place to experience colorful folkloric festivals such as the Midsummer Celebration (end of June) and sophisticated art events. There are Opera companies in several Swedish
                                                                        cities, and outside Stockholm, 18th Century Opera can be experienced at the Drottningholm Royal Theatre and at the Confidencen Theatre. In the major cities, there are also many important
                                                                        art museums. The Museum of Modern Art in Stockholm has one of the greatest collections of American pop art anywhere in the world.
Sweden is also a place to experience a unique kitchen based on fresh produce from the forests and the sea. Sweden brought the world the smorgasbord, the gravlax and meatballs, but the
                                                                        Swedish kitchen has a much broader appeal. Over the last decade, Swedish chefs have been extremely successful internationally. In October, 2000, the Swedish national team of chefs
                                                                        won the Olympic Games in Cooking. Their cuisine can be sampled at restaurants and inns all over the country.
Visit Sweden is the official website for tourists and your gateway to all that Sweden has to offer as a year-round holiday destination. Visit the site for useful travel and tourist information.
Visit Sweden.com  (http://www.visitsweden.com/)

## Overview
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or
                                                                        English by an authorized translator.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable for Tourist, Relatives/Friend, Business, Conference, Sports and Cultural are: -

[Table:    Business]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or with debit / credit card.

## VFS service charge
Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 942 EGP / 15 Euro : payable in cash or with debit / credit card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Egyptian pounds is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
-  The Visa fee & service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

[Table:    Business]
Below are the additional optional services available at the visa application center at nominal price.
All optional services are non-refundable.
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge in EGP 942 (for submission with biometrics) inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for applicants applying at the visa application Centre.(the VFS service charge is changeable based on the euro rate and can be changed without any notifications, and the difference amount can be paid or refunded on the same day of submission).

[Table:    Business]

## VISA Fee Exemption:
The following pay no fee:
- Children under six years of age.
- School pupils, students, research students and accompanying teachers on study or training trips.
- Third-country researchers travelling for the purpose of pursuing scientific research.
- Representatives of non-governmental organisations who are aged 25 or under, who take part in seminars, conferences, sports events, cultural events or educational events organised
                                                                            by NGOs.
- Relatives of citizens of the EU, Norway, Iceland, Liechtenstein or Switzerland, if they travel together with them or will be meeting them in connection with the trip. Read more about which individuals are counted as relatives on the Swedish Migration Board website. Relatives of Swedish citizens have to pay the fee for visa applications.

## Documents Required
- To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
- Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Download application form in English.
- Download application form in Swedish.
- One recent photograph in color, of head on, with the uncovered head for gentleman and white background.
- Passport :
- Copy of the biometric and all used pages.
- current passport must contain at least two blank pages ( one of them shouldn’t have a visa in the other side)
- The passport should be valid for at least 3 months after return from the planned trip.
- Previous passport covering the last 7 years is mandatory
- Movement certificate is required in these cases:
- The passports not covering the last 7 years.
- If there is a gap between the current and the previous passport more than 3 months.
- Invitation letter of official invitation from the inviting company in Sweden (on official company paper, stamped and signed containing the following information :
- The full address and contacts of the company
- Name and position of the countersigning officer
- Purpose and duration of the visit
- Person or entity that will bear the travel and living costs and whether the sponsor gives financial guarantee for the visa applicants' return to Egypt.
- Certificate of the employment: specifying the date of recruitment, position in the company, salary level, purpose of the travel and confirmation of leave approved.
- Documents to be provided by company owner: original and copy of the commercial registry and tax card translated.
- Original personal bank statement for the past 6 months in the absence of bank statement, proof of the other assets has to be provided.(Each page has to be stamped)
- A round trip ticket reservation, primary reservation is mandatory.
- Hotel booking confirmation or proof of accommodation.(primary reservation)
Travel medical insurance covering the entire period of the intended stay, and valid for all Schengen states and covering any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation
                                                                        for medical reasons, urgent medical attention .emergency hospital treatment or death during the stay .the minimum coverage must be 30.000 EUR.
If the documents is in Arabic it should be translated into English or Swedish
If the applicant is under the age of 18, one of the Parents must at least accompany the minor during the visit at VFS Center, and the other parent must provide an original official (Notarized) consent letter in both English and Arabic. also, if one of the applicants is living abroad must provide an original official (Notarized) consent letter in both English and Arabic. please note that original birth certificate translated into English must be provided and provide copies from parent's passports.
Important Note:
Original Family registry Certificate is mandatory for any marital status from Country of Origin to be translated into English.
Please gather the relevant documents provided in the document checklist click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/36EROPTSHdnAYkjfYOjzc9/684f802d7950ce6b6fc0ecf6f4b65241/Check_list_Business-updated.pdf): 

## Photo Specifications
Note: We regret we cannot accept photographs that do not meet these requirements
 Please provide one recent photographs (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- It should be without glasses.
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background].
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note : Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. For detailed information, please here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/YV6igMjBHi7Xgeojqz3my/65f2dcae173a274288b25d0dcf372264/Photograph_requirements.pdf).

Visa processing time is usually 14 working days for both locations Cairo and Alexandria.
